About

40+ Years of Material

Cayce Mautino spent 21 years in the United States Navy — rising to the rank of Senior Chief Petty Officer — and came out the other side with more stories than a therapist wants to hear. Now he's turning all of it into comedy.

Based in Tulsa, Oklahoma, Cayce trades sea stories for school stories as a middle school teacher in rural Oklahoma by day and stand-up comedian by night. His sets draw from 40+ years of lived experience — military life, marriage, parenting a daughter, and the daily miracle of surviving middle schoolers.

Smart. Grounded. Real. Cayce's comedy hits because it actually happened — and he lived to tell it.

Recurring Performance

1° of Separation — Suicide Prevention & Mental Health

Cayce is a recurring performer with 1 Degree of Separation, a program that uses life-saving comedy to deliver suicide prevention and mental health training. Combining his military background and lived experience, Cayce brings both humor and heart to one of the most important conversations we can have.

Visit 1° of Separation →
Also Featured

Mic Drop Comedy Club · Plano, TX — Teachers Gone Bad Tour

Headlined alongside the Teachers Gone Bad tour across Oklahoma and Texas. Also performed in FL, TN, CO, NC, MO, TX, AR, and KS — including The Grove Comedy Club (Lowell, AR) and Goodnights (Raleigh, NC).

As Seen On NewsOn6

'Comedy Comes 2 Cleveland' — Firefighter Fundraiser

After wildfires swept through rural Oklahoma during spring break, Cayce organized a benefit comedy show to support the Cleveland Fire Department — firefighters who worked around the clock in extreme conditions as high winds fueled dangerous flames. Past shows have also raised money to pay off student lunch debt, provide holiday gifts for students, and stock a school clothing closet for students in need. For Cayce, patriotism isn't just words — it's taking care of your community.

Read the NewsOn6 Story →
The Story

From Sailor to Punchline

Every good comedian has a story. Cayce's just happens to involve multiple deployments, a classroom full of teenagers, and a whole lot of love.

Early Life
Oklahoma Roots
Born and raised with that classic Midwest sensibility — the kind that sees the funny in everything, even when things are tough.
21 Years
U.S. Navy Service
Two decades of military life — deployments, duty stations, and service. Rose to the rank of Senior Chief Petty Officer, and collected a catalog of stories you can't make up.
Family
Husband & Dad
Met his wife, built a life, started a family. Parenting a daughter while navigating post-military life gave him an entirely new library of material.
Today
Teacher by Day. Comedian by Night.
Now a middle school teacher in rural Oklahoma, Cayce channels 40+ years of lived chaos into a stand-up act that's touring nationally.

Them Laugh.

Booking now for comedy clubs, corporate events, fundraisers, military events, and private events across the country — basically anywhere people need to laugh and aren't afraid to admit it.
